name: respond.io API
description: The respond.io Developer API enables developers to seamlessly integrate messaging capabilities into their existing platforms or applications. The API provides functionalities such as sending and receiving messages, managing contacts, and automating messaging campaigns. The API follows RESTful conventions and uses common methods like GET, POST, PUT, and DELETE. Request and response bodies are encoded in JSON, and authentication is required for all requests.
